channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tent camping in front of Vincent Square for a few days already, 3rd July
item.description:
Tent camping in front of Vincent Square for a few days already

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Vane Street, Victoria, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The sign post for parking restrictions has been hit, 3rd July
item.description:
This sign post I think was hit by a skip - it is now very wobbly! It is not enough to fall over yet but it can be moved around a lot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Grove, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on the corner of crescent Road, 3rd July
item.description:
Sofa and other things dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead

item.title: Chairs and bed slats, 3rd July
item.description:
Dumped on.street outside 13 Roding Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roding Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction rubble again, 3rd July
item.description:
The rubbish bins were emptied today… and the people who are renovating the house across the park filled them up bags of rubbish and rubble from the deconstruction, there’s no room for trash. Can these be dumped again, I can tell you which house is doing this?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 18 Tavistock place in pavement, 3rd July
item.description:
Hole on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Tavistock Place, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bins overflowing!! 3 weeks no collection., 3rd July
item.description:
Recycling bins have not been emptied for over 3 weeks. Bins are full and bags/boxes of recycling are left all over pavement, some boxes are tipping into resident front garden. Needs to be emptied & cleared immediately. Thanks!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prout Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 3rd July
item.description:
Two mattresses,a Lime bike and rubbish dumped behind garage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 445, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park and Pedestrian Exits Litter/Rubbish, 3rd July
item.description:
The whole car park is heavily littered with areas full of piles of rubbish and abandoned furniture
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jenner Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cannister edge of road, 3rd July
item.description:
Gas cannister edge road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yew hedging, overhanging footpath, 3rd July
item.description:
The hedge has progressively extended further over the pavement and is now forcing pedestrians to step off the path and onto the grass verge in order to pass. While this may be manageable during the summer months, the verge becomes muddy and difficult to use during the winter, creating an unnecessary hazard and inconvenience for pedestrians, including those with mobility issues, pushchairs, or wheelchairs. This issue has worsened over time, with the hedge encroaching further each year. (See photo) I would be grateful if the council could investigate this matter and arrange for the hedge to be cut back to restore safe and full use of the footpath. Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your response.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Wickham Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and debris on Anerley Station Road/Minden road, 3rd July
item.description:
I increasingly notice this area is dirty and unkempt with rubbish. On more than one occasion, I have noticed medical waste.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Station Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Co-op, 3rd July
item.description:
Coop is still littering. Please fine them. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned rental bikes, 3rd July
item.description:
Scooters left in maple house, idonia Street, deptford, London These scooters are illegally parked here all day long

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation by the pavement, 3rd July
item.description:
I have been clearing this for the past three years by paying a gardener. Is looking after streets pavements not the Councils job any more? Has Haringey Council been exempted from looking after our streets, pavements and residents? This area has been a hazard when parking and coming out of the car while wearing crutches, and it became a public toilet for pets and foxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Hawthorn Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of bulk furniture, 3rd July
item.description:
Loads of items left on pavement, been there for a couple of weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works traffic lights causing mayhem, 3rd July
item.description:
Road work traffic lights, just at riefield rd near falconwood station, where there are no road works, causing gridlock and huge tail backs on A2 exit to riefield road around Falcon wood and associated rds. Massive congestion and polution, abs nightmare and no need for it. A week so far, so why?.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riefield Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking against restrictions, 3rd July
item.description:
Every week day this car parks at the end if kilworth Avenue, CM15 8PS, all day from 7am -5/6pm, through restrictions. This was the day he forgot to apply this handbrake and the car was in the middle if the road for10hrs. It has not stopped him parking by 1a

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kilworth Avenue, Hutton Mount, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd July
item.description:
Waste dumped on bridge footpath by German hospital.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Madinah Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on ceres road, 3rd July
item.description:
Doors have been dumped on the corner it's Ceres road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
